name: Todd Cheewing
subject: During the Game
body:

clean_body: Derek, Are you watching this great Patriots game? By doing so, you'll be supporting the New Hampshire Republican State Committee as we plan out our 2020 strategy. Sincerely, Todd Cheewing Executive Director, NHGOP | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301
